items.content_html: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

items.content_html: Documentation for Obsidian Mkdocs Publisher
items.title: ObsidianPublisher/docs: Documentation for Obsidian Mkdocs Publisher

items.content_html: Github Publisher helps you to publish your notes on a preconfigured GitHub repository from your Obsidian Vault, for free, and more!
items.title: ObsidianPublisher/obsidian-github-publisher: Github Publisher helps you to publish your notes on a preconfigured GitHub repository from your Obsidian Vault, for free, and more!

items.content_html: Pastes images right to imgur.com
items.title: gavvvr/obsidian-imgur-plugin: Pastes images right to imgur.com

items.content_html: This is a plugin for Obsidian that allows you to make API requests and get the response in the form of a JSON file
items.title: Rooyca/obsidian-api-request: This is a plugin for Obsidian that allows you to make API requests and get the response in the form of a JSON file

items.content_html: Obsidian Plugin for social-scientific Qualitative Data Analysis (QDA). An open alternative to MAXQDA and atlas.ti, using Markdown to store data and research codes.
items.title: chrisgrieser/obsidian-quadro: Obsidian Plugin for social-scientific Qualitative Data Analysis (QDA). An open alternative to MAXQDA and atlas.ti, using Markdown to store data and research codes.

items.content_html: A description for the plugin
items.title: chrisgrieser/pseudometa-obsidian-plugin-template: A description for the plugin

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that enables you to increase/decrease the size of an image by holding down a configurable key (defaults to left alt), hovering over an image in preview mode and scrolling.
items.title: nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom: An Obsidian plugin that enables you to increase/decrease the size of an image by holding down a configurable key (defaults to left alt), hovering over an image in preview mode and scrolling.

items.content_html: Transform your daily note-taking experience with the "Better Daily Notes" Plugin. Seamlessly integrated, this plugin empowers you to organize and manage your daily notes effortlessly.
items.title: showaykerker/better-daily-notes-obsidian-plugin: Transform your daily note-taking experience with the "Better Daily Notes" Plugin.   Seamlessly integrated, this plugin empowers you to organize and manage your daily notes effortlessly.

items.content_html: Example vault for Quadro, the QDA Plugin for Obsidian.
items.title: chrisgrieser/quadro-example-vault: Example vault for Quadro, the QDA Plugin for Obsidian.

items.content_html: A simple MkDocs plugin that converts Obsidian callout blocks to mkdocs supported Admonitions.
items.title: sondregronas/mkdocs-callouts: A simple MkDocs plugin that converts Obsidian callout blocks to mkdocs supported Admonitions.

items.content_html: An Obsidian.md plugin randomly exposing you to your cards. Supports habits, to-dos, spaced repetition flashcards, iterative reading and more.
items.title: koljapluemer/obsidian-the-queue: An Obsidian.md plugin randomly exposing you to your cards. Supports habits, to-dos, spaced repetition flashcards, iterative reading and more.

items.content_html: An Obsidian Plugin that lets you translate between languages without moving you fingers away from the keyboard.
items.title: kon-foo/Obsidian-Translate-Inline: An Obsidian Plugin that lets you translate between languages without moving you fingers away from the keyboard.

items.content_html: This is a plugin of obsidian for users writing in an easy way.
items.title: Yaozhuwa/easy-typing-obsidian: This is a plugin of obsidian for users writing in an easy way.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian to add advanced controls (like sorting and filtering) to standard markup tables
items.title: pistacchio/obsidian-enhanced-tables: A plugin for Obsidian to add advanced controls (like sorting and filtering) to standard markup tables

items.content_html: Movie and Tv show tracker plugin for Obsidian
items.title: Shreshth-mehra/Obsidian-TV-Tracker: Movie and Tv show tracker plugin for Obsidian

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that formats and styles your notes with a focus on configurability and extensibility.
items.title: platers/obsidian-linter: An Obsidian plugin that formats and styles your notes with a focus on configurability and extensibility.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md) that adds additional `x-callback-url` endpoints to the app for common actions — it's a clean, super-charged addition to Obsidian URI.
items.title: czottmann/obsidian-actions-uri: A plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md) that adds additional `x-callback-url` endpoints to the app for common actions — it's a clean, super-charged addition to Obsidian URI.
